name: NEMO: Execution-Aware Optimization Modeling via Autonomous Coding Agents

description: arXiv:2601.21372v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present NEMO, a system that translates Natural-language descriptions of decision problems into formal Executable Mathematical Optimization implementations using autonomous coding agents (ACAs). Existing approaches rely on specialized large language models (LLMs) or bespoke task-specific agents that are often brittle and frequently generate...
author: Yang Song, Anoushka Vyas, Zirui Wei, Sina Khoshfetrat Pakazad, Henrik Ohlsson, Graham Neubig
